Class MockVacationModeService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockVacationModeService
public final class MockVacationModeService extends Object
Mock vacation mode service for FR-21. Stores a selected schedule and date range and exposes the effective override state.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    activateVacationMode(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, Schedule schedule, String actor)
    Activates vacation mode with specified schedule and dates.

    Activates vacation mode with specified schedule, dates and hours.

    Checks whether a schedule is allowed to execute at the given date.
    boolean

    Checks whether a schedule is allowed to execute at the given date and time.

    Clears vacation mode if using specified schedule.

      Gets the vacation mode configuration.

      the configuration

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Checks if vacation mode is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if enabled

    • isActiveOn

      public boolean isActiveOn(LocalDate date)
      Checks if vacation mode is active on the specified date.
      Parameters:
      date - the date
      Returns:
      true if active on date

    • isActiveOn

      public boolean isActiveOn(LocalDateTime dateTime)
      Checks if vacation mode is active at the specified date and time.
      Parameters:
      dateTime - the date and time
      Returns:
      true if active at that time

    • getSelectedSchedule

      public Schedule getSelectedSchedule()
      Gets the selected vacation schedule.
      Returns:
      the schedule or null

    • isSelectedScheduleLocked

      public boolean isSelectedScheduleLocked(String scheduleId)
      Checks whether the provided schedule is currently protected by an active vacation configuration.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - schedule identifier
      Returns:
      true if deletion should be blocked

    • canExecuteSchedule

      public boolean canExecuteSchedule(String scheduleId, LocalDate date)
      Checks whether a schedule is allowed to execute at the given date.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - schedule identifier
      date - evaluation date
      Returns:
      true when execution is allowed

    • canExecuteSchedule

      public boolean canExecuteSchedule(String scheduleId, LocalDateTime dateTime)
      Checks whether a schedule is allowed to execute at the given date and time.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - schedule identifier
      dateTime - evaluation date and time
      Returns:
      true when execution is allowed

    • getLockedScheduleDeletionMessage

      public String getLockedScheduleDeletionMessage(String scheduleName)
      Creates a user-friendly message for blocked schedule deletion while vacation mode is enabled.
      Parameters:
      scheduleName - schedule display name
      Returns:
      message explaining why deletion is blocked

    • getOverriddenSchedules

      public List<Schedule> getOverriddenSchedules()
      Gets the schedules overridden by vacation mode.
      Returns:
      list of overridden schedules

    • activateVacationMode

      public void activateVacationMode(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, Schedule schedule, String actor)
      Activates vacation mode with specified schedule and dates.
      Parameters:
      startDate - start date
      endDate - end date
      schedule - the selected schedule
      actor - actor triggering activation

    • activateVacationMode

      public void activateVacationMode(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, LocalTime startTime, LocalTime endTime, Schedule schedule, String actor)
      Activates vacation mode with specified schedule, dates and hours.
      Parameters:
      startDate - start date
      endDate - end date
      startTime - start time
      endTime - end time
      schedule - the selected schedule
      actor - actor triggering activation

    • deactivateVacationMode

      public void deactivateVacationMode(String actor)
      Deactivates vacation mode.
      Parameters:
      actor - actor triggering deactivation

      public void clearIfUsingSchedule(String scheduleId, String reason)
      Clears vacation mode if using specified schedule.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - schedule ID
      reason - reason for clearing
